case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. KEITH DARRELL FITCH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEITH DARRELL FITCH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FITCH, KEITH DARRELL $705.22 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
